introSection: Thriller was a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari previously located at Happy Land in Adana, Adana, Turkey

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The Thriller was manufactured by Pinfari in 1992. It was owned by Eredi Viviani S.A.S. and operated in multiple places in Italy. It operated at EuroPark Milano Idroscalo in Lombardy, Italy for an unknown time, leaving in 2005. It subsequently operated at Leolandia from 2006 to 2007.

It was purchased by UK showmen Joseph Manning and William Thurston. From 2013 to 2016, it appeared at Hyde Park Winter Wonderland as the Alpine Thriller. In 2015 and 2016, it operated at The Beach Brent Cross during the summer months.

fullText:
Thriller was a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari previously located at Happy Land in Adana, Adana, Turkey

The Thriller was manufactured by Pinfari in 1992. It was owned by Eredi Viviani S.A.S. and operated in multiple places in Italy. It operated at EuroPark Milano Idroscalo in Lombardy, Italy for an unknown time, leaving in 2005. It subsequently operated at Leolandia from 2006 to 2007.

It was purchased by UK showmen Joseph Manning and William Thurston. From 2013 to 2016, it appeared at Hyde Park Winter Wonderland as the Alpine Thriller. In 2015 and 2016, it operated at The Beach Brent Cross during the summer months.
